# Bassomi

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.12.0 from seed `borea`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed borea`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 59.1% land, 40.9% ocean, 1 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Grassland**, 16 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 28 regions, 24 settlements, 4 realms
- **Capital:** Timortepimar, seat of House Beodaveo
- **Dominant power:** Knorkthy (of 3 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 1100 After Reckoning
- **Highest peak:** 4,500 m · **volcanoes:** 9 (3 active)

## Volcanoes

- **Mount Eibrei** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Dogrstabra** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Thornskogra** — cinder cone, active, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Fjagrdo** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Hreibo** — cinder cone, extinct, summit 4,365 m
- **Mount Vyskvo** — shield, extinct, summit 3,826 m
- **Mount Brafjygard** — cinder cone, active, summit 3,602 m
- **Mount Stagrvu** — cinder cone, dormant, summit 2,833 m
- **Mount Stunbry** — cinder cone, active, summit 2,666 m

## Notable features

- **Mount Gharqe** — the highest peak
- **The Muqkaqa** — the greatest river
- **Lake Benavia** — the largest inland water

- Raita is an inland reach of dry basin country, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Matemia is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Neollacissoboa.
- Nalensita is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Ciassomintemeo.
- Kamaa is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Qaikhkhaaqjaabad.
- Kaiqe is an inland reach of sun-scoured dunes, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Rushraizku is an inland reach of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.

## Notable figures

- **Celladibe, the General** — Celladibe broke the long siege of Timortepimar.
- **Condobeo, the Mountaineer** — Condobeo was first to stand atop Gharqe and return alive.
- **Iia, the Explorer** — Iia charted the far coasts and traced the Muqkaqa to its source.
- **Auvialo, the Heretic** — Auvialo was exiled from Timortepimar for denying the old gods.

## Ruins

*Settlements that did not survive to the present day.*

- **Sodeote** (town) — founded 267, stormed and left a ruin in 575

## Faiths

### the Faith of Maajai — Maajai, god of the Harvest

> Maajai scattered the first seed across Raita; the golden fields were the gift, and the tithe the price.

Followed across 13 region(s).

### the Way of Nallarau — Nallarau, god of the Hearth

> Nallarau lit the first hearth in Matemia, and its flame has never since gone out.

Followed across 4 region(s).

### the Faith of Stuskvo — Stuskvo, god of the Sea

> In the first age the waters covered all, until Stuskvo drew up the land and set the Muqkaqa running to the sea.

Followed across 7 region(s).

### the Rite of Senanaba — Senanaba, god of the Mountain

> Senanaba raised Gharqe as a throne above the world, and from its slopes breathed life into the valleys of Nalensita.

Followed across 4 region(s).

## Resources & trade

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Grain, Horses, Wine, Fish
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Theiskau
- **Trade hubs:** Timortepimar, Theiskau, Vanaba, Starnstandsky
- **Deposits:** Iron ×51, Copper ×38, Gold ×16, Gems ×10, Stone ×81, Coal ×31, Timber ×9, Grain ×44, Livestock ×130, Fish ×12, Furs ×5, Spices ×2, Salt ×23, Horses ×37, Wine ×17

## Legends of the founding age

- **74 After Reckoning** — The city of Timortepimar was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **86 After Reckoning** — Timortepimar rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Bassomi was proclaimed.
- **87 After Reckoning** — The city of Liaca was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **119 After Reckoning** — The city of Dellaeollano was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **124 After Reckoning** — Liaca rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Mane was proclaimed.
- **127 After Reckoning** — The city of Neollacissoboa was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **149 After Reckoning** — Neollacissoboa rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Sade was proclaimed.
- **154 After Reckoning** — Dellaeollano rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Rillasemorpau was proclaimed.
- **391 After Reckoning** — Over control of the Gharqe passes, Bassomi and Rillasemorpau went to war; a marriage-pact bound Bassomi and Rillasemorpau in uneasy peace.
- **672 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Timortepimar; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **729 After Reckoning** — Gharqe woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **737 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Timortepimar flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.
- **871 After Reckoning** — An academy founded on the shores of Benavia gathered the age's finest cartographers.

| Baubano | 100 | 6 | 100 | 0 | extinct |
| Mane | 100 | 3 | 100 | 0 | extinct |

## Chronicle

## Heightmap

A real 360×360 16-bit heightmap is exported alongside this report (`.heightmap16.png` and raw `.heightmap.r16`). Import it into Blender, Unity, Godot, or World Machine and scale the height to **4,500 m** (value 65535 = 4,500 m above the lowest point). The topographic contour map (`.topo.png`) shows the same relief as isolines.
